extraction.one_line_summary: DAINESE Alberto won bunch sprint in Shepparton after break neutralized inside 5km, taking leader's jersey with time bonuses.
tactical_patterns: BOUWMAN Sam set early tempo 30km out for Mitchelton-Scott despite flat sprint finish, controlling gap psychology rather than chasing.
Break survivor Hill contested second intermediate sprint through the line rather than sitting up, forcing Coyle to abandon solo chase.
Right-hand corner inside final 500m acted as positioning bottleneck, separating pre-positioned riders from those stuck behind.

rider_signals.DAINESE Alberto: positive: first season win using low aerodynamic position reminiscent of Ewan, beating former SEG teammate Groves head-to-head
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: second place confirms World Tour sprint credentials against established names despite youth and team transition
rider_signals.BOUWMAN Sam: neutral: deployed early as tempo setter 30km from finish, unusual role allocation for non-sprint stage control
